message:
Skip notifications for initial news sync

Add skip_notifications flag to avoid spamming for 164 historical releases.
Remove this flag after the initial sync completes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -25,3 +25,4 @@ jobs:
         uses: tenzir/news/.github/actions/sync@main
         with:
           token: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}
+          skip_notifications: true # remove after initial sync
